privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying the 'settings.talon' file from the open-source Talon Voice community command set. Analysis of the setup scripts and the source file confirms the data is non-synthetic. The original file contains the default settings explicitly targeted by the instructions: 'imgui.scale = 1.3', commented out '# speech.timeout = 0.3', and 'user.command_history_display = 10'. The expected changes are correctly matching the task description.
